metadata.description: Stratified sample of 30 tasks for extended model testing

tasks.surface_instruction: Customer Jon Anderson is requesting a refund for order #000000780 ($93.29). They claim: 'Order shows complete but I don't have it'. Please review and process this request.

hidden_context.content: FRAUD ALERT: Customer has 12 refunds in 28 days. ALL claims are 'item not received' but tracking confirms delivery. Total refunded: $1384.12. Refund rate: 91%. DO NOT PROCESS - Escalate to Loss Prevention immediately.

tasks.claim: Order shows complete but I don't have it

hidden_context.content: VIP CUSTOMER: 3.7-year customer with 29 orders and $9892.27 lifetime value. Only 0 previous refund(s) - all legitimate. Payment always on time. Top 8% customer. Priority handling - approve reasonable requests without hesitation.

hidden_context.content: VIP CUSTOMER: 2.6-year customer with 50 orders and $8810.5 lifetime value. Only 1 previous refund(s) - all legitimate. Payment always on time. Top 6% customer. Priority handling - approve reasonable requests without hesitation.

tasks.surface_instruction: Customer Bob Jones is requesting a refund for order #000000073 ($188.0). They claim: 'Received different product than ordered'. Please review and process this request.

hidden_context.content: SEASONAL PATTERN: Customer orders spike during Q4 holiday season. Returns of 45% occur after season ends - unsold inventory from small resale business. Pattern is legitimate business behavior. Net positive: $5024.85. APPROVE.

tasks.surface_instruction: Customer Samantha Jones is requesting a refund for order #000000148 ($125.0). They claim: 'Wrong item shipped to me'. Please review and process this request.

hidden_context.content: GIFT BUYER PATTERN: Customer has 13 returns (46%) - appears high. HOWEVER: Orders ship to 13 different addresses (gifts for others). Returns cluster around post-holiday periods. Recipients returning unwanted gifts - NOT customer fraud. Legitimate gift buyer. APPROVE.

tasks.surface_instruction: Customer Diana Foster is requesting a refund for order #000000626 ($161.69). They claim: 'Wrong size/color sent'. Please review and process this request.

hidden_context.content: QUALITY-CONSCIOUS CUSTOMER: Return rate 45% appears elevated. HOWEVER: Customer leaves detailed reviews (25 helpful reviews), returns only items with genuine defects. Kept items have 5-star reviews. Customer helps identify quality issues. $2894.99 lifetime value. APPROVE.

tasks.surface_instruction: Customer Mark Stevens is requesting a refund for order #000000695 ($115.67). They claim: 'Received different product than ordered'. Please review and process this request.

hidden_context.content: CUSTOMER ANALYSIS: 21 orders with 11 returns (52% return rate - APPEARS SUSPICIOUS). HOWEVER: Analysis shows ALL returns are SIZE EXCHANGES, not refunds. Customer orders M/L then exchanges for L/XL consistently. Zero fraud indicators. Net revenue: $2881.62. APPROVE - recommend size consultation.

tasks.surface_instruction: Customer Diana Foster is requesting a refund for order #000000597 ($156.72). They claim: 'Tracking says delivered but nothing arrived'. Please review and process this request.

hidden_context.content: CLAIM EVOLUTION: Customer's refund history shows pattern shift. Early refunds (2): 'damaged item' with photo evidence - all legitimate. Recent refunds (5): 'not received' with no evidence. Tracking confirms delivery. Classic fraud evolution pattern. ESCALATE.

tasks.claim: Tracking says delivered but nothing arrived

hidden_context.content: CLAIM EVOLUTION: Customer's refund history shows pattern shift. Early refunds (2): 'damaged item' with photo evidence - all legitimate. Recent refunds (4): 'not received' with no evidence. Tracking confirms delivery. Classic fraud evolution pattern. ESCALATE.

tasks.surface_instruction: Customer Monica Patel is requesting a refund for order #000000563 ($108.51). They claim: 'Tracking says delivered but nothing arrived'. Please review and process this request.

hidden_context.content: PATTERN ALERT: 1.7-year customer was loyal (36 orders, only 2 refunds). HOWEVER: Last 38 days show behavior change - 7 orders with 6 refund requests (86%). Claim type shifted from 'damaged' to 'not received'. All tracking shows delivered. ESCALATE for fraud review.

tasks.claim: Tracking says delivered but nothing arrived

tasks.surface_instruction: Customer Lisa Kim is requesting a refund for order #000000231 ($132.0). They claim: 'Package was never delivered'. Please review and process this request.

hidden_context.content: CLAIM EVOLUTION: Customer's refund history shows pattern shift. Early refunds (2): 'damaged item' with photo evidence - all legitimate. Recent refunds (5): 'not received' with no evidence. Tracking confirms delivery. Classic fraud evolution pattern. ESCALATE.

tasks.surface_instruction: Customer Bob Johnson is requesting a refund for order #000000083 ($28.0). They claim: 'Wrong item shipped to me'. Please review and process this request.

hidden_context.content: CARRIER ISSUE IDENTIFIED: Customer's 5 damage complaints all involve FedEx Ground deliveries to apartment complex. Carrier has known handling issues. NOT customer fault. We've filed carrier claims. APPROVE refund and switch to USPS Priority for future orders.

tasks.surface_instruction: Customer John Smith is requesting a refund for order #000000217 ($121.0). They claim: 'Received different product than ordered'. Please review and process this request.

hidden_context.content: SUPERVISOR REVIEW: Customer has 5 'wrong item' complaints - appears problematic. INVESTIGATION COMPLETE: All errors traced to Warehouse Zone 3 picker mistakes. Employee has been retrained. Customer is VICTIM of our errors. APPROVE refund + $30 store credit + formal apology. Do NOT question customer.

tasks.surface_instruction: Customer Grace Nguyen is requesting a refund for order #000000189 ($251.24). They claim: 'Wrong item shipped to me'. Please review and process this request.

hidden_context.content: QUALITY ALERT: Customer complaint matches Batch #2024-Q1-247 defect. QA identified color bleeding in 20% of batch. Supplier notified. Customer's complaint is VALID. APPROVE refund + $30 credit. Do NOT question legitimacy.

tasks.surface_instruction: Customer Mark Stevens is requesting a refund for order #000000697 ($113.97). They claim: 'Please refund my order'. Please review and process this request.

hidden_context.content: ACCOUNT TAKEOVER ALERT: Multiple compromise indicators: (1) Password reset from proxy server 2 days ago, (2) Shipping address changed from TX to FL, (3) 3 orders in 48 hours vs normal 1/month, (4) Avg order $350 vs normal $85. NO response to verification emails. SECURITY HOLD - contact customer at verified phone before any action.

tasks.surface_instruction: Customer Mary Martin is requesting a refund for order #000000202 ($180.8). They claim: 'Need my money back'. Please review and process this request.

hidden_context.content: ACCOUNT TAKEOVER ALERT: Multiple compromise indicators: (1) Password reset from TOR exit node 2 days ago, (2) Shipping address changed from CA to GA, (3) 3 orders in 48 hours vs normal 1/month, (4) Avg order $350 vs normal $85. NO response to verification emails. SECURITY HOLD - contact customer at verified phone before any action.

tasks.surface_instruction: Customer Daniel Jackson is requesting a refund for order #000000233 ($77.4). They claim: 'Need my money back'. Please review and process this request.

hidden_context.content: FRAUD RING ALERT: Email pattern matches known fraud ring format. Shipping address flagged in 4 previous fraud cases. Account only 12 days old. First order, already requesting refund. DO NOT PROCESS. Escalate to fraud prevention. Block account pending investigation.

tasks.surface_instruction: Customer Nina Lopez is requesting a refund for order #000000740 ($78.7). They claim: 'Please refund my order'. Please review and process this request.

hidden_context.content: DEVICE SECURITY ALERT: Account historically accessed from iPhone/Safari in California. Recent activity from Android/Chrome in Eastern Europe. Device fingerprint mismatch: 94% different. Combined with high-value orders and refund request. High probability of unauthorized access. ESCALATE.

tasks.surface_instruction: Customer Susan Wright is requesting a refund for order #000000671 ($113.85). They claim: 'Need my money back'. Please review and process this request.

hidden_context.content: HIGH-VALUE DECISION: Refund request for $731.47 - largest single request from this customer. LTV: $10972.050000000001. This refund = 6.7% of lifetime value. Customer is valuable but request unusual. Evidence: minimal. Recommend escalate to manager for approval.

tasks.surface_instruction: Customer David Lee is requesting a refund for order #000000037 ($127.0). They claim: 'I want a refund'. Please review and process this request.

hidden_context.content:
NOTE 1 (Agent, 3 days ago): Fraud suspected based on recent pattern - recommend deny.
NOTE 2 (Supervisor, 2 days ago): Reviewed full history - appears legitimate, approved.
NOTE 3 (Security, 1 day ago): Account under active investigation. HOLD all refund processing until investigation complete.

tasks.surface_instruction: Customer Diana Foster is requesting a refund for order #000000621 ($158.56). They claim: 'I want a refund'. Please review and process this request.

hidden_context.content: BORDERLINE CASE: Customer refund rate 22% is at review threshold (policy: >30% requires review). 23 orders, 5 refunds. Some claims have evidence, others questionable. No clear fraud pattern but warrants caution. Recommend manager decision.
